recalls.Description:
The Lterfear Multifunction Pounding Game, model No. D888, is being recalled due to a serious ingestion hazard posed by high-powered magnets that can detach. This wooden toy features multiple games including whack-a-mole, fishing, xylophone, and carrot cutting, along with various accessories such as mallets, a fishing rod, and wooden fruits. The absence of product markings raises safety concerns for children.

Consumers are urged to stop using the recalled toy immediately. If you own this product, it is crucial to contact Findriver for a full refund. Follow the instructions to mark the product as 'RECALLED' and dispose of it properly to ensure safety.
recalls.Title: Lterfear Multifunction Pounding Game Recalled Due to Magnet Ingestion Risk

Images.Caption: Recalled Multifunction Pounding Game with Accessories
Recalled Multifunction Pounding Game with Accessories

Retailers.Name: Available online at Amazon.com from June 2025 to September 2025, priced between $24 and $28.

Distributors.Name: Shenzhen Haichuan International Travel Service Co., Ltd., dba indriver and Weeksome

Hazards.Name: Risk of ingestion from high-powered magnets that can detach, leading to severe health issues.

Remedies.Name: Stop using the toy, contact Findriver for a refund, mark it as 'RECALLED', dispose of it, and send a photo of the disposed product.

recalls.metaDescription: Lterfear Multifunction Pounding Game recalled due to magnet ingestion risk. Contact Findriver for refunds and safety instructions.
